violations.text: The maintenance of molluscan shellfish tags was observed in need of the following adjustments for proper storage... - Containers of molluscan shellfish were observed without the tags remaining with the item until empty. The tags are to remain with the shellfish until used completely and container is empty. - Molluscan shellfish tags were observed not marked with the date when last shellfish from the bag/portion were used. Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris... - Ice machine - Cookline light shields Non-food-contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude the buildup of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The Cookline is lacking a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC called plumber at the time of inspection. Sink ordered. PIC to contact inspector when handwashing sink is installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The Cookline is lacking a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC called plumber at the time of inspection. PIC to contact inspector when handwashing sink is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

At the time of inspection, Shellfish tags were not maintained with the date the last shellfish was used from the bag. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and marked with the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of the deli slicer (Used previous day) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. (Per kitchen staff, deli slicer is taken out of service to be properly washed/rinsed/sanitized prior to use.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles of chemical(s) are to be marked with the common name. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

At the time of inspection, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Tuna was observed thawed in a cookline prep unit at 39 degrees Fahrenheit in its intact packaging. Due to the temperature observed, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Tuna was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
